Rung.Comment: Step 500: ***** NEW ANODE ROUTINE ***** Anode Component Start EOAT Vac check
take dummy picture while waiting for or picking.. point grey issue when running back to back inspections with different exposures
Rung.Text: LIM(505,seqRobot.Step,550)[OTE(iInhibitInspFault.1) ,OTU(vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].Requests.bSave1) OTU(vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].Requests.bSave2) ,XIC(Bit_Part_Type_LL) MOV(ivisAnodeLL,Camera.intInspection) ,XIO(Bit_Part_Type_LL) MOV(ivisAnodeSL,Camera.intInspection) ,ONS(Machine_Oneshots[8].14) [OTU(Camera.bitErrorInspection) OTU(Camera.bitComplete) OTL(Camera.bitRun_Request) ,RES(ctuAnodeVisionRetries) ] ,[XIC(Camera.bitErrorInspection) ,XIC(Camera.bitComplete) ,XIC(bAnDummyImageComplete) ] OTU(Camera.bitErrorInspection) OTE(bAnDummyImageComplete) ];

Rung.Comment: Step 524: Wait for anode cassette to be in place select which anode is being used for this layer - bottom, middle, top
Step 522: go to and pick top anode from conveyor
Step 524: Pick up anode with vacuum

Step 526: Move to anode approach and check vacuum if vac ok then continue else dump the part; clear the cassette and restart the layer
JEO - Changed location to vision from conveyor wait. - 05/15/15
Rung.Text: EQU(seqRobot.Step,526)XIC(seqRobot.Perm)CONCAT(Message_Robot[55],K_Str_Blank,seqRobot.Status)[XIC(System.Auto) XIO(Bit_RobotOnlyStepMode) ,XIC(seqRobot.StepNext) ][ONS(Machine_Oneshots[7].13) [MOV(s800.Robot.MotionCounter,intMotionCounter) ,COP(s800.LocationConfig[Loc_Vision_Anode],s800.LocationConfig[iLocTemp],1) ,MOV(iLocTemp,s800.Commands.MoveLocationIndex) ,OTL(s800.Commands.Jump_Req) ] ,XIC(s800.Robot.statFaulted) OTL(seqRobot.Fault) ,XIO(s800.Commands.Jump_Req) NEQ(s800.Robot.MotionCounter,intMotionCounter) XIC(s800.Robot.Jump_Complete) [[EQU(intLayer_Anode_Type,1) OTL(Bit_BAnode_Picked) ,EQU(intLayer_Anode_Type,2) OTL(Bit_MAnode_Picked) ,EQU(intLayer_Anode_Type,3) OTL(Bit_TAnode_Picked) ] ,XIC(I_EOAT_Vac) MOV(550,seqRobot.Step) ,XIO(I_EOAT_Vac) [MOV(580,Robot_Next_Step) ,MOV(800,seqRobot.Step) ,OTL(Sig_Robot_mispickAnode) ,OTL(actRobotVac.ACT.Abort) ,OTL(Bit_Robot_Part_Missing_Trigger) ,OTL(_debug.0) ,OTL(Bit_Need_More_Anodes) ,OTL(seqRobot.Fault) ] ,MOV(0,s800.Commands.Approach_Height) ,OTU(seqRobot.StepNext) ] ];

Rung.Comment: make sure we are done with the dummy image before allowing the actual inspection to occur
Step 552: Register part on EOAT need to save with bit/path 2 after vision upgrade so that an image is saved in the display folder
Rung.Text: EQU(seqRobot.Step,551)XIC(seqRobot.Perm)CONCAT(Message_Robot[56],K_Str_Blank,seqRobot.Status)[XIC(System.Auto) XIO(Bit_RobotOnlyStepMode) ,XIC(seqRobot.StepNext) ][[TON(Machine_Timers[6],?,?) ,OTL(O_Vision_Light_On) ] ,XIC(Machine_Timers[6].DN) [[OTU(vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].Requests.bSave1) OTL(vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].Requests.bSave2) ,XIC(Bit_Part_Type_LL) MOV(ivisAnodeLL,Camera.intInspection) MOV(ivisAnodeLL,HMI.To_HMI.MainDisplayIndex) ,XIO(Bit_Part_Type_LL) MOV(ivisAnodeSL,Camera.intInspection) MOV(ivisAnodeSL,HMI.To_HMI.MainDisplayIndex) ] ,ONS(Machine_Oneshots[8].13) [CONCAT(strImageFolderPath,strImageDisplay,vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].SavePaths.strSavePath2) ,CONCAT(vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].SavePaths.strSavePath2,strBackSlash,vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].SavePaths.strSavePath2) ,CONCAT(vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].SavePaths.strSavePath2,strImage,vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].SavePaths.strSavePath2) ,DTOS(Camera.intInspection,strTemp) CONCAT(vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].SavePaths.strSavePath2,strTemp,vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].SavePaths.strSavePath2) ,CONCAT(vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].SavePaths.strSavePath2,strDotBMP,vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].SavePaths.strSavePath2) ,OTU(Camera.bitErrorInspection) OTU(Camera.bitComplete) OTL(Camera.bitRun_Request) ] ,[XIC(Camera.bitError) ,XIC(Camera.bitErrorInspection) ] [MOV(552,seqRobot.Step) ,XIC(ctuAnodeVisionRetries.DN) [OTL(Bit_Vision_Error) ,OTL(HMI.To_HMI.ChangeMainImage) ,MOV(553,seqRobot.Step) ] ,OTU(seqRobot.StepNext) ] ,XIO(Camera.bitRun_Request) XIC(Camera.bitComplete) [MOV(553,seqRobot.Step) ,OTL(HMI.To_HMI.ChangeMainImage) ,OTU(seqRobot.StepNext) ] ] ];

Rung.Comment: Step 553: Decide if Vision Passed if vision does not pass then dump the part in the reject bin and then clear the rest of the anodes on the cassette and signal need more anodes - will continue with the same layer since it has not be incremented
Rung.Text: EQU(seqRobot.Step,553)XIC(seqRobot.Perm)CONCAT(Message_Robot[57],K_Str_Blank,seqRobot.Status)[XIC(System.Auto) XIO(Bit_RobotOnlyStepMode) ,XIC(seqRobot.StepNext) ][OTU(O_Vision_Light_On) ,XIO(Debug_Disable_Vision) [NEG(vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].Results.dblResults[0],s800_Vision_Offset.X) ,NEG(vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].Results.dblResults[1],s800_Vision_Offset.Y) ,MUL(vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].Results.dblResults[2],57.3,s800_Vision_Offset.Roll) ] ,XIC(Debug_Disable_Vision) [MOV(0,s800_Vision_Offset.X) ,MOV(0,s800_Vision_Offset.Y) ,MOV(0,s800_Vision_Offset.Roll) ] ,[XIO(Bit_Vision_Error) [LIM(Vision_Score_LSL,vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].Results.dblResults[3],1) ,XIC(Debug_Disable_Vision) ] LIM(Vision_AnodeX_LSL,s800_Vision_Offset.X,Vision_AnodeX_USL) LIM(Vision_AnodeY_LSL,s800_Vision_Offset.Y,Vision_AnodeY_USL) LIM(Vision_AnodeR_LSL,s800_Vision_Offset.Roll,Vision_AnodeR_USL) [MOV(200,seqRobot.Step) ,EQU(intLayer_Anode_Type,1) RES(Machine_Counters[2]) ,EQU(intLayer_Anode_Type,2) RES(Machine_Counters[5]) ,EQU(intLayer_Anode_Type,3) RES(Machine_Counters[6]) ,XIC(Bit_BAnode_Picked) XIC(Bit_MAnode_Picked) XIC(Bit_TAnode_Picked) OTL(Sig_Robot_Picked_Anodes) ] ,[GRT(s800_Vision_Offset.X,Vision_AnodeX_USL) ,LES(s800_Vision_Offset.X,Vision_AnodeX_LSL) ,GRT(s800_Vision_Offset.Y,Vision_AnodeY_USL) ,LES(s800_Vision_Offset.Y,Vision_AnodeY_LSL) ,GRT(s800_Vision_Offset.Roll,Vision_AnodeR_USL) ,LES(s800_Vision_Offset.Roll,Vision_AnodeR_LSL) CTU(_cntRollLow,?,?) ,XIO(Debug_Disable_Vision) LES(vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].Results.dblResults[3],Vision_Score_LSL) ,XIC(Bit_Vision_Error) ] [[MOV(Settings.Default_Alarm_Trigger_Count.Value,Machine_Counters[2].PRE) ,MOV(Settings.Default_Alarm_Trigger_Count.Value,Machine_Counters[5].PRE) ,MOV(Settings.Default_Alarm_Trigger_Count.Value,Machine_Counters[6].PRE) ] ,EQU(intLayer_Anode_Type,1) [CTU(Machine_Counters[2],?,?) ,XIC(Machine_Counters[2].DN) [OTL(Bit_VisionFailed) ,OTL(seqRobot.Fault) ,RES(Machine_Counters[2]) ] ] ,EQU(intLayer_Anode_Type,2) [CTU(Machine_Counters[5],?,?) ,XIC(Machine_Counters[5].DN) [OTL(Bit_VisionFailed) ,OTL(seqRobot.Fault) ,RES(Machine_Counters[5]) ] ] ,EQU(intLayer_Anode_Type,3) [CTU(Machine_Counters[6],?,?) ,XIC(Machine_Counters[6].DN) [OTL(Bit_VisionFailed) ,OTL(seqRobot.Fault) ,RES(Machine_Counters[6]) ] ] ,[XIO(Bit_BAnode_Picked) ,XIO(Bit_MAnode_Picked) ,XIO(Bit_TAnode_Picked) ] MOV(580,Robot_Next_Step) ,XIC(Bit_BAnode_Picked) XIC(Bit_MAnode_Picked) XIC(Bit_TAnode_Picked) [MOV(0,Robot_Next_Step) ,OTL(Sig_Robot_Picked_Anodes) ] ,MOV(800,seqRobot.Step) ,OTL(Bit_Need_More_Anodes) ,OTU(Bit_Vision_Error) ,OTU(seqRobot.StepNext) ] ] ];
